title: FREE Bellevue Home Buying Class
subtitle: Learn the insider tips and tricks to snagging your dream home without the usual stress.
description:
Navigating the home buying process can feel like a daunting journey, but you don't have to do it alone. Join your local Redfin hosts, Joe Sheldon and Christina Woollen, for a comprehensive and free home buying class designed to take the mystery out of the market. We will also be joined by special guest Carly Ozuna from Rocket Mortgage to provide expert insight into the lending landscape.

Whether you are a first-time buyer or looking to refresh your knowledge, we’ll walk you through every step of the process. During this session, we will cover:
01 Preparing to Buy: Understanding if it is the right time for you and how to determine what you can afford.
02 Finding Your Home: Navigating local market trends, school ratings, and walkability scores.
Winning the Offer: Setting a price strategy, reviewing contingencies, and utilizing Redfin’s "Deal Room" to track your progress.
03 Closing the Deal: Understanding the final steps from earnest money deposits to getting your keys on closing day.
04 The Redfin & Rocket Advantage: Learn how you can save on fees when you choose a Redfin agent and a Rocket loan officer.

Good to Know:
Cost: This class is completely free to attend.
What to Bring: If you’d like to get a head start on your budget, have your income and monthly spending information handy for use with our Home Affordability Calculator.
Expert Access: You'll have direct access to experienced agents and loan officers to ask your specific questions during our Q&A session.
Next Steps: After the class, you can sign up for a personal buyer consultation or download the Redfin app to start booking same-day tours.

hosts.name: Joe Sheldon
hosts.description: I transplanted to Seattle in 2009, and the Pacific Northwest has become my new home. I am in love with its natural beauty and the abundance of year-round activities. Having grown up around the construction business, I developed a deep understanding of what makes a good home. My real estate passion comes from my desire to help you navigate the journey of purchasing one of the largest yet most personal items of your lifetime. I joined Redfin in 2014 to pursue this passion relentlessly. I like my customers to think of me as their coach throughout the entire process. My team and I will give you expert guidance at every turn, and I'll be by your side through the ups and downs. You can expect me to provide honest advice and tireless advocacy.

hosts.name: Christina Woollen
hosts.description: Buying, selling, or investing - let’s make it an adventure you’ll actually enjoy. My goal is simple: to get you the best outcome while keeping you informed, supported, and genuinely cared for every step of the way. From our first chat to closing day and beyond, I’ll be there to guide you, answer your questions, and celebrate every win. Backed by the Redfin team, I bring market insight, helpful tools, and a people-first approach. Consistently earning 5-star reviews, I’m here to help you step into a place that truly feels like home.

hosts.name: Carly Ozuna
hosts.description: I've been a Loan Officer for over 10 years, specializing in residential mortgages and personalized financing strategies. I’m passionate about helping clients navigate the loan process with clarity and ease. I love working locally—it allows me to build lasting relationships and support my community firsthand.

title: New Construction Open House
description: Don't miss your chance to tour this pristine new construction home in Kirkland. As a bonus we are also hosting the two next door ADUs open as well. These absolute must see this weekend!
